subject: FW: Food for thought
body:
From: CORE: communique [mailto:CORE_communique@mail.vresp.com] 
Sent: Thursday, November 08, 2007 1:06 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Food for thought

 


 CoreCommunique<http://proxy.mi.vresp.com/63acb8465/www.thecoreclub.com/communique/CORE_communique.gif> 


  

*	SMART COOKIE: Join us for Family Sunday Brunch this weekend featuring a Cookie Decorating Party and screening of the Pixar smash hit Ratatouille
*	IT’S YOUR TURN TO TRUFFLE: Chef Dan Kluger and Pastry Chef Robert Fitzhenry present their James Beard Truffle Dinner here at CORE:
*	TALKING TURKEY: Enjoy a spectacular and stress-free Thanksgiving at CORE:
*	PICTURE PERFECT MORNING: Eli Broad leads a discussion on The Broad Contemporary Art Museum at LACMA and the Cultural Landscape of Los Angeles
*	FIGHT CLUB: VIP seats and special access to UFC 78: Validation

See the communiqué below or go to www.thecoreclub.com for details on these and many other CORE: events. To reserve your space, call (212) 486-6600 or e-mail reservations@thecoreclub.com. 


CORE: culinary  

Sunday Brunch featuring Cookie Decorating Party and screening of Ratatouille
Sunday, November 11 from 11am – 2:30pm
Brunch from 11am to 2:30pm in the Restaurant
Film at 11am and 2pm in the Screening Room

Don’t miss our Sunday Brunch series this weekend with a Cookie Decorating Party the whole family is sure to enjoy. Join us in the dining room for fabulous food, and bring home delicious treats personalized by your little one and baked by CORE: Pastry Chef Robert Fitzhenry. We are also pleased to present the Pixar smash hit Ratatouille, the animated story of Remy, a French rat with a cultivated palate who rises from his humble beginnings to become head chef at a Paris restaurant.

Winter Truffle Indulgence Dinner 
Friday, November 30
Hors d’oeuvres & wine reception at 7pm.
Chef’s tasting menu with matching wines at 8pm.
Dessert course to follow.

Due to overwhelming response for our event at the historic James Beard house, we are pleased to present a second truffle dinner for members here in the CORE: dining room. Celebrate the Winter Truffle Harvest at a spectacular meal created by CORE:’s very own Chef Dan Kluger and Pastry Chef Robert Fitzhenry. $250 per person. Reserve your space today at (212) 486-6600 or reservations@thecoreclub.com.
 
Thanksgiving at CORE: 

Inaugurate the holiday season with an unforgettable Thanksgiving at CORE:. Invite friends and family to an exquisite 3-course prix-fixe meal in the dining room at CORE:. Adults $150. Children $50. Then catch a football game in the Screening Room. Reserve your space today at (212) 486-6600 or reservations@thecoreclub.com. 

CORE: conversation 

Dr. Caldwell Esselstyn on Preventing and Reversing Heart Disease
Monday, November 12
Wine reception at 6:30pm. Conversation at 7pm. 
The Screening Room 

The author of PREVENT AND REVERSE HEART DISEASE, Dr. Esselstyn will share his 20-year research study and nutritional strategies used to counsel hundreds of patients who have seen their heart disease miraculously improve and often disappear. Dr. Esselstyn’s book is a nutrition and health book with a foundation based on years of rock hard, peer-reviewed science.  

The Broad Contemporary Art Museum at LACMA and the Cultural Landscape of Los Angeles presented by Americans for the Arts
Tuesday, November 13
Breakfast in Art Gallery at 8:30am. Program in Screening Room at 9am.

L.A.’s most significant new contemporary art space, The Broad Contemporary Art Museum, is the centerpiece of phase one of Transformation, the Los Angeles County Museum of Art’s (LACMA) ambitious program of expansion and renovation. Join us for a discussion featuring Eli Broad, Philanthropist and Collector; Michael Govan, CEO and Wallis Annenberg Director of the Los Angeles County Museum of Art; and Joanne Heyler, Director/Chief Curator, Broad Art Foundation. 

 
CORE: films  


Class Act
Wednesday, November 14 Wine reception at 6:30pm. Screening at 7pm.The Screening Room 

Young Audiences New York enriches students’ creative and intellectual lives by partnering with public schools and other institutions to provide the quality and range of arts programs necessary for a well-rounded education. This documentary weaves teacher extraordinaire Jay W. Jenson’s personal story with the fate of arts education in America today. 

Sparkle
Thursday, November 15 at 5pm
The Screening Room 

A contemporary romantic comedy that follows Sam, a charming, young schemer who has ambitions in the glamorous world of public relations when he moves to London. However, his best laid plans suffer a setback when true love turns his world upside down in the most unexpected of circumstances. 

Love in the Time of Cholera
Thursday, November 15 at 7pm and 9:30pm
The Screening Room 

Based on Nobel Prize winning author Gabriel Garcia Márquez’s novel, this film tells the passionate love story that unfolds in turn-of-the-century South America. Starring Javier Bardem, Liev Schreiber and Benjamin Bratt.
  

CORE: access

UFC 78: Validation
Saturday, November 17
Doors open at 7:15pm. Event begins at 8:15pm
Prudential Center in Newark, New Jersey 

Unbeaten Light Heavyweight contenders Michael “The Count” Bisping and “Sugar” Rashad Evans will clash in the main event of UFC 78: Validation. Not only will it be the first time in UFC history that two winners of the Ultimate Fighter reality series meet in the octagon, but there will be serious title implications for both of these world-class athletes, making this one of the most important bouts of 2007. CORE: members have access to purchase VIP seats, meet select fighters, and more. Please contact Pablo De Ritis at (212) 381-7803 or pablo.deritis@thecoreclub.com. 

Led Zeppelin: Live at London’s 02 Arena 
A concert in aid of the Ahmet Ertegun Education Fund
Monday, December 10 - New rescheduled date!
London’s 02 Arena 

Experience one of the most sought-after entertainment events of the decade. Led Zeppelin will headline a special tribute concert celebrating the life and work of Ahmet Ertegun, founder of Atlantic Records. The legendary band will be joined by Bill Wyman’s Rhythm Kings, Pete Townshend, Foreigner and Paolo Nutini. CORE: members now have unique access to purchase VIP tickets to this highly anticipated event. 

  Go to www.thecoreclub.com for details on these and many other CORE: events. To reserve your space call (212) 486-6600 or e-mail reservations@thecoreclub.com All dates and times are subject to change. 

  

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

  

.





________________________________

If you no longer wish to receive these emails, please reply to this message with "Unsubscribe" in the subject line or simply click on the following link: Unsubscribe <http://cts.vresp.com/u?cea60fd2a2/142a9cc2ad/2eb57b0> 

________________________________

CORE:
66 East 55th Street
New York, NY 10022

 

 <http://cts.vresp.com/o.gif?cea60fd2a2/142a9cc2ad/2eb57b0>
